title: Bedrock Guardrails Configuration
description: Configuration for the AWS Bedrock Guardrails extension. Applies Bedrock Guardrails to evaluate LLM prompts for content moderation.

bedrock_cluster.description: Envoy cluster name configured to reach the Bedrock endpoint.

bedrock_api_key.description: API key for AWS Bedrock authentication.

bedrock_guardrails.description: List of Bedrock guardrails to apply. Duplicate identifiers are removed automatically.

bedrock_timeoutms.description: API request timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 20000 (20 seconds).
